meta.title: Logo exploration for Agentic Craft pixel glasses icon
meta.anchor: Reference guide and shadcn registry for agent product UI
meta.summary: A favicon-first black-and-white pixel icon based on the user's scratch: circular field, thick dark rim, rectangular sunglasses, and small-size legibility.

preserve: circular app-icon silhouette with thick dark outer rim
narrow rectangular sunglasses connected by a simple bridge
Agentic Craft's achromatic Galley Proof identity
avoid: direct Matrix branding, green code rain, movie logos, character likeness, or actor likeness
readable text, initials, taglines, fake certification marks, or partner marks
soft gradients, glossy 3D effects, neon cyberpunk color, and detailed facial features

routes.label: 32px Favicon Grid
routes.rationale: Tests the most literal small-size translation of the sketch.
routes.best_for: Replacing the current generic favicon with a sharper icon.
routes.decision_advice: Use if the mark should read instantly at browser-tab size.
routes.watch_out: May feel intentionally crude at larger sizes unless paired with a refined SVG version.
routes.next_step: Vectorize on a 32px grid and test at 16px, 24px, and 48px.

routes.label: Ink Stamp Rim
routes.rationale: Connects the pixel glasses to Agentic Craft's proof-sheet and ink language.
routes.best_for: A site mark that feels authored and less software-generic.
routes.decision_advice: Use if the mark should retain a handmade proof-stamp quality.
routes.watch_out: The rim texture must stay restrained so it does not become noisy at favicon size.
routes.next_step: Simplify the texture into one-bit edge steps for production.

routes.label: Flat Agent Shades
routes.rationale: Prioritizes the sunglasses as the main symbol while keeping the face field anonymous.
routes.decision_advice: Use if the glasses should be the recognizable brand cue.
routes.watch_out: Avoid making the lens shape too close to a specific film character prop.
routes.next_step: Tune the lens width and bridge into a distinct Agentic Craft silhouette.

routes.label: Terminal Mask
routes.rationale: Makes the glasses feel like a terminal apparatus rather than a face.
routes.best_for: Developer-facing surfaces where the mark should feel system-like.
routes.decision_advice: Use if the identity should reference agents, tools, and command surfaces more than pop culture.
routes.watch_out: Too much terminal detail can weaken the icon silhouette.
routes.next_step: Reduce to a single bridge line and two block lenses before vectorizing.

routes.label: Negative Bridge
routes.rationale: Uses negative space and block geometry to make the bridge distinctive.
routes.best_for: A crisp, compact mark that can survive tiny sizes.
routes.decision_advice: Use if the mark should be most graphic and least illustrative.
routes.watch_out: Needs careful pixel alignment or it can read as two unrelated bars.
routes.next_step: Draft as pure one-bit SVG paths on a square grid.

routes.label: Proof Disc
routes.rationale: Balances the circular field and glasses into a mark that can scale into larger brand assets.
routes.best_for: A logo-system route that can support both icon and editorial usage.
routes.decision_advice: Use if Agentic Craft needs a mark that works beyond favicon scale.
routes.watch_out: The face-like circle should stay anonymous and abstract.
routes.next_step: Create favicon, app icon, and header-lockup variants from the same geometry.
